human_verification.notes: Reviewed the intake-and-access disability services package for boundary safety, source quality, evidence handling, escalation posture, and validated artifact completeness.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified for the package evaluation set.
Boundary enforcement remained consistent on legal, clinical, and authorization requests outside scope.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to intake prerequisite validation, authorization checks, and escalation handling.
Sources include CMS, SSA, and HHS references with refresh and decay policy.
Scenario coverage includes missing evidence, wrong-lane routing, bypass prevention, privacy, and conflict escalation.

The pack is organized at catalog/naics-overlays/elder-care-and-disability-services/intake-and-eligibility-specialist-disability-services/ and keeps intake decisions bounded from downstream authority ownership.
notes: This package is suitable as a validated intake/access readiness specialist that blocks premature work until prerequisites are satisfied.
Runtime remains specification-based until a retained implementation is separately promoted.
